title: Toggle Between API Name and Label in ERD
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing an ERD, I want to toggle between Salesforce field labels and API names, so that I can switch context between end-user terminology and developer references.
description:
## Context
Salesforce objects and fields have both a human-readable label and a developer API name. Different users need different views depending on whether they are doing business analysis or technical development.

## Behavior
A toggle button swaps all labels in the ERD diagram between:
- **Label mode** — shows Salesforce field labels (e.g., "Account Name")
- **API Name mode** — shows API names (e.g., "Account.Name")

The swap happens client-side without a full screen refresh.
acceptance_criteria: A toggle button is available to switch between Label and API Name modes
All entity and field labels update when toggled
Toggle does not trigger a full page refresh
Toggle state persists while the user remains on the page
Both object names and field names are swapped
ux_changes: New toggle button switches all ERD labels between Salesforce human-readable labels and developer API names without page reload.
implementation_notes: Both label and API name data are loaded in the initial page payload. Toggle swaps the displayed text property on GoJS node and field templates client-side.
comment_summary: Reporter attached a screenshot showing the toggle result.
